nodes.label: AlphaDesk backend package — multi-agent Indian equity research system.
Agent package — Scanner, Research, Analyst, RiskManager, Execution.

Structured LLM output mapped onto AnalystRecommendation.

Execution agent — paper watchlist + human-in-the-loop gate.  IMPORTANT: the IND

Scanner agent — turns a natural-language query into NSE candidates.  Pure async
Fallback intent parse when the LLM is unavailable.
